register.note: Full-width, self-framed poster (THE LINE OF BEST FIT / 30 OBSERVATIONS) legible as a thumbnail; matches the exemplar's protagonist composition but lacks dimensional craft to reach 4.

The residual 'misses' are labelled and drawn (bold error ticks in hero, red segments/penalty squares in Run/Break), so what the line minimises is in the picture; 4 once the squared-area mark lives in the hero.
Canvas self-explains via in-plot 'y-hat — the model's line' label, title, drag/click hint, axes and live readout legend; meaning isn't prose-only.
With the readout no longer clipped (full six-cell strip + clearance) and the left column void closed, the frame is Distill-soft with clean focal hierarchy — clears floor 3.
Each motion is explanatory and action-tied (live refit on drag, Lines/Squares/Hide toggles, snap-back, penalty-square balloon), matching the exemplar's explanatory animation.
Lab grammar held exactly — gold observations, blue prediction line, red reserved for error (MSE/residuals/penalty squares) with no all-red flood and AA tinted prose terms.

hero.note: Full-width portrait of gold observations under a blue fit-line with bold labelled residual ticks — poster-worthy and on-grammar; would reach 4 by carrying the squared-error area mark.

assessment.note: Transfer item (transfer-house-prices) is now an open write-your-own prompt with a revealed model answer.

verdict.summary: Both prior atmosphere defects fixed in pixels (readout fully in-viewport, column void closed); all six register dimensions clear floor 3 — advance.
